announcements.title: Everdew Update!
body: Everdew — Version 0.4.2 Update!
- Fixed a bug which caused animals that are dead to respawn after load
- Top down sprite sorting should now be more reliable
- Reverted amount of days Pigs, Cows and Sheeps survive without food back to 5 days
- Re-added the tooltip for the seed buttons

announcements.title: Momentum Bound Announcement!
body: Momentum Bound is officially launching soon!
Watch the Teaser Trailer and Official Trailer now on the Momentum Bound Demo detail page to find out when Momentum Bound launches.

announcements.title: Nexus Launcher
body: Nexus Launcher — Version 3.0.0 Update!
Headline Features
- Added Collections: browse games by category, view videos, and see recently added games
- Added a Friends page: send/receive friend requests, message friends, and view what they’re currently playing
- Video support has been added to the launcher
- Added "Date added" to the Details page
- You can now reply to comments
User Interface & Visuals
- The announcement panel now supports long posts by allowing you to scroll within each announcement
- The Library page now shows a clearer hint: "Hold and drag a game to rearrange your Library, Right-click on a game to open context menu "
- Improved visual spacing and readability for announcements
- Announcements and Changelogs now render bullet points as proper list items
- Improved animation and styling for dropdowns in both Comments and Analytics
- Added a highlight colour change for buttons on the Details page
- Removed hover transform animations for specific buttons on the Details page and Analytics
- Added a new "Back to top" button for easier navigation
- The Play button now switches to "Running" while a game is active
- Toast notifications now use a more opaque background for improved readability
- Added "Date added" to the Details page
Functionality & Navigation
- Clicking a game in the Recent History panel now takes you directly to the Details page
- Added a controller indicator to the Details page when gamepads are connected
- Video support has been added to the launcher
- Games can now be locked in the Library, preventing them from being moved until unlocked
- You can now reply to comments
- Launcher changelogs can now be viewed in Settings
- Category filters have been added to the Store page
- Added an "Updates available" filter to the Library page
- Developer names now appear on game cards in the Store
Preferences & Saved Sorting
- Your dropdown preference for sorting New or Top comments is now saved
- Your dropdown preference for sorting the Top 5, 10, or 20 devs in Analytics is now saved
Cleanup & Polish
- Removed the obsolete Developers section from Analytics
- Removed the full stop from most of the toast notification
Bug Fixes
- Fixed a bug that caused the Details page to open automatically after a game finished installing
- Fixed an issue where the Details page could begin installing even after the game had already finished installing
